channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Epic is reportedly building an extraction shooter for Disney
item.description: Besides a wealth of Fortnite skins based on Disney IP, it hasn't really been clear what the entertainment company has gotten in return for its $1.5 billion investment in Epic from 2024. That could change this November, Bloomberg reports, when Epic releases a Disney-themed extraction shooter. The game is one of three Disney projects the publisher is currently working on, and is reportedly expected to be Epic's comeback after the company laid off 1,000 employees in March due to a "downturn in Fortnite engagement." The game is reportedly similar to Arc Raiders, a multiplayer shooter where players...

item.title: Un institut voué à la sécurité de l’IA examine les protocoles d’OpenAI
item.description: L’institut canadien de la sécurité en matière d’intelligence artificielle (IA) a désormais accès à l’ensemble des « protocoles » d’OpenAI, a annoncé le ministre de l’Intelligence artificielle et de l’Innovation numérique, Evan Solomon.

item.title: The FAA is encouraging gamers to get jobs in air traffic control
item.description: Sick! The Federal Aviation Administration is targeting gamers in its most recent job advertisement for air traffic controllers. The administration's annual hiring window opens at 12AM ET on April 17, and considering the ongoing shortage of air traffic controllers, it's calling this a period of "supercharged hiring." Rad! The FAA's YouTube video draws parallels between gaming and directing air traffic, and notes that the average salary for the role after three years is $155,000. Hella! The FAA is clearly seeking players who are at least old enough to remember the Xbox One and Bjergsen in the LC...

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Saturday, April 11 (game #1538)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Saturday, April 11 (game #1035)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Saturday, April 11 (game #769)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: The Dreame Z20 Station is an excellent example of how power, performance and price can be balanced in a cordless vacuum
item.description: The Dreame Z20 Station offers a close-to-perfect combination of design and performance and would be a fantastic addition to any home.

item.title: It Sure Looks Like This Is the End for the Current Era of ‘Star Trek’
item.description: You can't get much more final than literally tearing down the sets for 'Strange New Worlds' and 'Starfleet Academy.'

item.title: Microsoft hands Linux Foundation key Surface data to help fix laptop battery life
item.description: Microsoft releases standardized battery dataset through Linux Foundation to address fragmented testing practices and enable consistent analysis of lithium-ion performance data
